audio_description: The audio clip features a male voice speaking in a neutral tone with a moderate pace, accompanied by the sound of footsteps and ambient background noise.
temporal_description: A man with short gray hair, wearing a light-colored suit, is seated and facing slightly to the side, his gaze directed forward. Behind him, two other men stand, one in a dark jacket and the other in a dark shirt with a white bandage on his arm; both appear to be observing the seated man. The setting is dimly lit with a greenish hue, featuring a metal-barred window in the background and a blurred figure partially visible in the foreground. The seated man remains still, while the two standing men maintain a steady posture, occasionally shifting their gaze slightly.
